title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
